Crater-pitted engineer suit with industrial laser and construction rivet systems. Hydraulic viewports showing fluid levels. Built for megastructure assembly under bombardment.
Military-surplus mercenary armor mixing three generations with black-market sensors. Incompatible tech achieving effectiveness. Anonymous configuration hiding extensive experience.
Exoskeleton scavenger nightmare using crustacean shell-armor with human actuators. Third-species breathing system grafted badly. Bio-adhesive critical seals. Adaptation trumping engineering.
Liquid-chrome power armor with optic camouflage and micro-missile pods. Neural interface requiring implants. Streamlined concealing protection. Cutting-edge wearable legend.
Sandstone tactical gear with trauma plates and extended water systems. Weeks-without-resupply ammunition. Solar collectors worn transparent. Autonomous desert campaign gear.
Ice-white pilot suit with extreme-cold rating and astrogation helmet computer. Command collar markings. Stellar-proximity radiation shielding. Hostile-space exploration leadership.
Reactor-yellow industrial EVA with radiation plating and fusion-core tools. Forearm geiger constant display. Hot-zone emergency repair systems. Active-core internal work gear.
Mahogany bounty hunter gear with electro-net and pheromone trackers. Mobility-prioritized armor. Each weapon for different biology. Lethal predatory versatility.
Marble-white space marine plate with combat scripture and plasma integration. Century-old campaign pauldrons. Devotional maintenance preserving integrity. Inseparable faith and firepower.
Navy-indigo command armor with forearm display and cape-concealed reactive plating. Energy saber and command rod displayed. Authority and protection elegantly synthesized.
Foundry-copper engineer suit with exposed struts and manufacturing tools. Welding burns creating camouflage. Assembly in combat zones where construction equals survival.
Chaos-pattern mercenary kit showing corporate, national, freelance layers. Desperate integration achieving protection. History through conflicting scars and scraped insignia.
Five-species scavenger rig with desperately chained environmental systems. Asymmetric improvisation achieving function. Beautiful only to survivors understanding necessary ugliness.
